name: Kahlua Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------Kahlúa Frosting-----------------------------
1 lb (16 oz) Sifted powdered sugar
6 tablespoons Butter
3 tablespoons Unsweetened cocoa
3 tablespoons Hot coffee
3 tablespoons Kahlúa
1. Grease and flour two 9-inch cake pans, set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form. Gradually add granulated sugar, beating until soft peaks form; set aside.
4. Cream shortening and light brown sugar until fluffy.
5. Add egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Sift flour, cocoa powder, and baking soda together.
7. Add to creamed mixture alternately with coffee and Kahlúa, beating well with each addition.
8. Fold egg whites into batter.
9. Pour into pans.
10. Bake 30 to 35 minutes until done. Cool for 10 minutes.
11. Turn cakes out onto wire racks. Cool completely.
12. Frost.
----------------------------Kahlúa Frosting-----------------------------
1. In a bowl, cream butter.
2. Add powdered sugar and cocoa, beating continually while adding Kahlúa.
3. Still beating, add hot coffee until thick and smooth consistency.
